message:
refactor: Apply clippy lints and improve code quality across runtime

Systematic clippy compliance pass addressing warnings across multiple
modules. No behavioral changes.

Key patterns applied:
- Replace manual Option/Result methods with more idiomatic alternatives
- Use if-let chains where appropriate (Rust 2024 edition)
- Add #[allow(...)] annotations with explanatory comments where lints
  are intentionally suppressed (e.g., clippy::too_many_arguments)
- Simplify match arms and reduce unnecessary bindings
- Add #[must_use] annotations to pure functions

Affected modules: channel/oneshot, cx, epoch, grpc/service, http/body,
lab/instrumented_future, lab/runtime, net/resolve, net/unix/*,
runtime/reactor/*, runtime/region_heap, runtime/state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
